aliases.canonical: contrast easy twitter/push/#oauth apis + examples with huge/complex #openid php libraries (cc: @chrismessina) - over a dozen classes with dozens of methods total in http://openidenabled.com/php-openid/. that's the 1.x libs (nevermind 2.x) and samples just for consuming openids. i have a lot more sympathy now for those who give up on or deprioritize openid support. the barrier to entry for openid support is far too high for independent developers. - tantek
